summary_text: **Relevant documents (most relevant for turning an external X post into an implementable Kernel task):** - [`docs/requirements-gpt54-codex-kernel.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/requirements-gpt54-codex-kernel.md) Defines the Kernel operating doctrine, including `Evidence before done` and multi-model council behavior that must frame any automation for an external source task. - [`docs/kernel/requirements-freeze-v1.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-freeze-v1.md) This is the freeze boundary for run-level requirements; it anchors when a task should move from exploration into execution and what constitutes a valid stop condition. - [`docs/kernel/preflight-roadmap-v1.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/preflight-roadmap-v1.md) Specifies the staged preflight gates (`requirements → plan → simulation → critique → replan → execution`) and highlights evidence/blocking rules needed before execution. - [`docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/requirements-phase-artifact-contract-v1.md) Core contract for artifact-first handoff; mandatory for making the external-post request into bounded `preflight/plan/implementation` artifacts with fail-closed checks. - [`docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/schema-v1.md) The schema for bootstrap receipt, runtime ledger, and compact artifact that your task should write/verify as evidence objects rather than raw inline context. - [`docs/kernel/interfaces/contracts.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/contracts.md) Gate and evidence contracts for phase transitions; important to avoid claiming completion without required model/evidence shape. - [`docs/kernel/interfaces/track-compat.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/interfaces/track-compat.md) Defines track boundaries so artifact/preflight/runtime edits don’t bleed across ownership scopes during implementation. - [`docs/kernel-preimplementation-readiness.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-preimplementation-readiness.md) Checkpoint document for readiness to begin implementation without regressing legacy semantics. - [`docs/kernel/context-governor.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel/context-governor.md) Critical if the X-post content is long/noisy: enforces bounded packetized context and prevents raw-context overload in Kernel execution. - [`docs/kernel/chatgpt-gpt-semi-auto-import.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-chatgpt-gpt-semi-auto-import.md) Closest existing pattern for turning an external authored source into repository-native, repeatable, kernel-consumable input without raw unbounded ingestion. - [`docs/kernel-mobile-content-workflow.md`](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/kernel-mobile-content-workflow.md) Useful source-grounding reference for user-originated external content tasks, especially intent extraction and issue-shaping behavior.
